title: DO you hate posers
wikitext:
[]: DO you hate posers?             Quote Post by whiemeat » Tue Jul 09, 2013 5:39 pm god I cant stand posers especially if they think they know about eva so tell me how do you know when somewon has never experienced NGE? for me its one of two things-pronunciation and when they ask you things about it You know somewon has never seen NGE when they pronounce it Evanjellion how many times do they pronounce it the right way in the anime I have three people who act as if they are my friends and I try to talk about eva with them and they say they watch it but what happens when I say anything about it such as who is your favorite eva piolet? and they say oh ones blond right whats her name again? god I hate that so tell me fellow evageeks how do you know when somewon is an eva poser?

[]:             Quote Post by Katana » Tue Jul 09, 2013 5:46 pm I have many friends who are able to appreciate deep stories, but they're unable to accept EVA simply because they still think that anime is for kids or just don't want to watch it, which pisses me off because it makes my country more retarded than ever. They play games, they watch even awesome movies like Bladerunner and whatnot, but they just don't want to appreciate anime. Also there are many jerks who pretend to watch EVA, but then they just compare it to Gundam or their other mecha craps, which is a huge mistake cuz nobody gives a damn about mechas in EVA.

[]:             Quote Post by Ænimal » Tue Jul 09, 2013 5:55 pm Katana wrote: I have many friends who are able to appreciate deep stories, but they're unable to accept EVA simply because they still think that anime is for kids or just don't want to watch it, which pisses me off because it makes my country more retarded than ever

[]:             Quote Post by Katana » Wed Jul 10, 2013 3:19 am Ænimal wrote: ^ This. i absolutely DESPISE people who say that cartoons are for children.

[]:             Quote Post by Ænimal » Wed Jul 10, 2013 3:28 am ah, you're also confused at my wording - not to worry; Wikipedia has all the answers :)

[]:             Quote Post by Katana » Wed Jul 10, 2013 3:32 am The only anime that has impressed a bit them was NHK ni Youkoso.

[]:             Quote Post by Nouw » Wed Jul 10, 2013 5:11 am There's a lot of hate for posers in this thread but there's no real reason given for why . Are they somehow ruining your enjoyment of Eva? Is your enjoyment of Eva somehow directly proportional to how much other people genuinely like it? Why does it matter if your friends pretend to like Eva? Surely you can just discuss it right here in this Evangelion discussion forum right? The question you raise is legitimate OP, how the hell do do you even recognize a poser? And more importantly, why would you give a toss about whether someone actually likes Eva or not? This thread is just baffling and reminds me of the whole 'fake-geek girl' shtick.

[]:             Quote Post by Jurrasic » Wed Jul 10, 2013 7:46 am Agree really. Odds are, your friend is simply trying to reach a common ground with you, why would you get upset with him/her for that?

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Wed Jul 10, 2013 1:34 pm Nouw wrote: There's a lot of hate for posers in this thread but there's no real reason given for why . Are they somehow ruining your enjoyment of Eva? Is your enjoyment of Eva somehow directly proportional to how much other people genuinely like it? Why does it matter if your friends pretend to like Eva? Surely you can just discuss it right here in this Evangelion discussion forum right? The question you raise is legitimate OP, how the hell do do you even recognize a poser? And more importantly, why would you give a toss about whether someone actually likes Eva or not? This thread is just baffling and reminds me of the whole 'fake-geek girl' shtick.

[]:             Quote Post by whiemeat » Wed Jul 10, 2013 5:23 pm nice explanation It makes a ton of sense
